title: build(deps): bump github.com/containers/common from 0.51.1-0.20230329113838-e27c30ee9b1b to 0.52.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/common](https://github.com/containers/common) from 0.51.1-0.20230329113838-e27c30ee9b1b to 0.52.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/common's releases.

v0.52.0

What's Changed

  • Bump to v0.51.0 by @​TomSweeneyRedHat in containers/common#1305
  • build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.25.0 to 1.26.0 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1306
  • Add Provider to MachineConfig by @​arixmkii in containers/common#1290
  • Enable DHCP macvlan by @​baude in containers/common#1292
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/containerd from 1.6.15 to 1.6.16 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1307
  • build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 from 2.7.0 to 2.7.1 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1308
  • build(deps): bump go.etcd.io/bbolt from 1.3.6 to 1.3.7 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1309
  • build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 from 2.7.1 to 2.8.0 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1310
  • build(deps): bump github.com/docker/docker from 20.10.23+incompatible to 23.0.0+incompatible by @​dependabot in containers/common#1311
  • Don't use lockfile.Locker, it is deprecated by @​rhatdan in containers/common#1313
  • build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.4.0 to 0.5.0 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1314
  • build(deps): bump github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface from 0.5.3 to 0.5.4 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1315
  • build(deps): bump golang.org/x/term from 0.4.0 to 0.5.0 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1316
  • build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/selinux from 1.10.2 to 1.11.0 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1318
  • libimage: search: add options for authentication by @​sstosh in containers/common#1321
  • libimage: make sure all events have an ID by @​vrothberg in containers/common#1325
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/containerd from 1.6.16 to 1.6.17 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1324
  • build(deps): bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.5.0 to 0.6.0 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1319
  • Support docker-specific network create options via CLI by @​hasan4791 in containers/common#1320
  • LookPath like impelementations for OS specific executable searches by @​arixmkii in containers/common#1131
  • build(deps): bump github.com/docker/docker from 23.0.0+incompatible to 23.0.1+incompatible by @​dependabot in containers/common#1322
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containers/image/v5 from 5.24.0 to 5.24.1 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1323
  • build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 from 2.8.0 to 2.8.1 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1326
  • libimage: wait to write an event until an image loaded by @​sstosh in containers/common#1327
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/containerd from 1.6.17 to 1.6.18 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1329
  • libimage: search: add IdentityToken option for authentication by @​sstosh in containers/common#1328
  • build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 from 2.8.1 to 2.8.3 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1331
  • containers.conf: add database backend option by @​vrothberg in containers/common#1333
  • pkg/auth: add NoWriteBack option by @​vrothberg in containers/common#1334
  • fix netavark IgnoreIfExists config test flake by @​Luap99 in containers/common#1336
  • libimage: pull events: set input name by @​vrothberg in containers/common#1339
  • build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.26.0 to 1.27.1 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1332
  • Vendor in latest containers/image by @​rhatdan in containers/common#1341
  • pkg/auth/Login: return a typed error by @​vrothberg in containers/common#1340
  • update c/image to latest by @​Luap99 in containers/common#1343
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.45.3 to 1.45.4 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1346
  • build(deps): bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.8.1 to 1.8.2 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1347
  • Fix the combination of "table " and \n in report formats by @​mtrmac in containers/common#1344
  • build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.27.1 to 1.27.2 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1348
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/containerd from 1.6.18 to 1.6.19 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1349
  • libimage: Fix getDockerAuthConfig() for authentication by @​sstosh in containers/common#1342
  • Vendor in containers/(storage, image) by @​rhatdan in containers/common#1351
  • build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 from 2.8.4 to 2.9.0 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1353
  • build(deps): bump golang.org/x/term from 0.5.0 to 0.6.0 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1355
  • build(deps): bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.6.0 to 0.7.0 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1354
  • netavark,NetworkUpdate: NetworkUpdateOptions must be IP addresses by @​flouthoc in containers/common#1358
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/containerd from 1.6.19 to 1.7.0 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1360
  • Allow cgroup-conf settings to be stored in containers.conf by @​rhatdan in containers/common#1364

... (truncated)

You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *dependabot[bot]* **Once this PR has been reviewed and has the lgtm label**, please assign zhangguanzhang for approval. For more information see [the Kubernetes Code Review Process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process). The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

OK, I won't notify you again about this release, but will get in touch when a new version is available. If you'd rather skip all updates until the next major or minor version, let me know by commenting `@dependabot ignore this major version` or `@dependabot ignore this minor version`. You can also ignore all major, minor, or patch releases for a dependency by adding an [`ignore` condition](https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/supply-chain-security/configuration-options-for-dependency-updates#ignore) with the desired `update_types` to your config file.

If you change your mind, just re-open this PR and I'll resolve any conflicts on it.
